_comment: Registry of every corpus source. tier: canon|fan|doc. status: have|todo. See README.md.

fan_local.note: DVPet species table (1219 unique). English-dub names. cross-check only.
DVPet Java logic for cross-checking mechanics only

fan_pulled_repos.name: wayland-vpets
fan_pulled_repos.note: THE sprite + stage-timer source. assets/{dm,dm20,dmx,pen,pen20}/<Name>.png = per-device NAMED 16x16 sprite SHEETS (16px native, upscaled x4 to 64px, multi-frame horizontal). Names match humulos romanization. COPYRIGHT.md: sprites+evo-data sourced from humulos(dm/pen/dm20/pen20/dmx/dmc)+wikimon -> CANON-ADJACENT. counts: dm 80, dm20 136, dmx 172, pen 127, pen20 235, dmall 669 (superset). dmall COVERS the DMX X-forms DVPet lacked (Anomalocarimon X, Black War Greymon X, Palmon X, Pegasmon X, Plesiomon X). ALSO carries per-device real-time STAGE TIMERS in docs/fragments/evol-dm.md (Digitama/BabyI/BabyII/Child/Adult/Perfect/Ultimate durations, differ per device). Does NOT carry branching evo CONDITIONS (CM/TR/OF/weight/win) -> those still from humulos per-version. Downsample /4 + split frames to use. Bandai IP (ripped dot art) -> fine for corpus, same hold-republish caveat for shipping.

fan_pulled_repos.name: digilib
fan_pulled_repos.note: C recreation of Digimon vpets. import-digimon.csv.example = evolution-data schema we want: name;power;wake;sleep;attribute;evolve-time;stage;version; then up to 6x {EvoTarget;Progression;CM(care-mistakes);TR(training);OF(overfeed);SD(sleep-disturb);W(weight)}. Also include/digimon.h + source/digimon.c (generated data).

fan_pulled_repos.name: RG_Digimon
fan_pulled_repos.note: RG-handheld vpet remake; per-version sprite PNGs (e.g. digimonNIGHTMARE1.png = Pendulum Nightmare Soldiers).

fan_pulled_repos.name: DigimonVPet
fan_pulled_repos.note: ESP32 vpet, compatible with REAL devices (authentic protocol/logic in src/GameLogic, src/VPetLCD). No bundled PNGs (sprites embedded). Good for cross-checking real-device mechanics + comms.

fan_pulled_repos._clones_are_gitignored: corpus/fan/ is in .gitignore (46MB of repos); only slim extracted data + manifests are tracked.

fan_could_not_pull.name: MultiVPet
fan_could_not_pull.note: Dropped per user 2026-06-29 — wayland-vpets supersedes it (comprehensive canon-sourced sprite set). Not pursuing.

fan_could_not_pull.name: Digimon Unlimited / AndroGochi
fan_could_not_pull.note: freeware Android APK, 460+ mons, not open-source. Data not cleanly extractable; community wiki digital-monster-unlimited.fandom.com has data -> fetch as doc later.

fan_could_not_pull.name: RetroMon
fan_could_not_pull.note: mobile app, not pullable as source.

fan_could_not_pull.name: Digital Partner Digimon
fan_could_not_pull.note: downloadable game, not source; page has design info.

fan_could_not_pull.name: DMComm
fan_could_not_pull.note: real-vpet protocol/data project — valuable authentic reference, fetch later.

fan_could_not_pull.name: dmc-sprite-database + GMMan/DigimonColorSpriteTool + aderekart.github.io
fan_could_not_pull.note: COLOR-focused; lower priority for mono-16x16. DigimonColorSpriteTool clonable if needed.

fan_could_not_pull.name: nuxill.neocities.org / withthewill FileIsland
fan_could_not_pull.note: web sprite/data archives — fetch as docs later.

dm20.evolutions: HAVE (canon/humulos/dm20/evo_ver1-5.md + evo_special.md, 130 entries, full branching conditions)

wikimon.use: per-device pages + per-Digimon data/evolution lines; resolve JP names + N.E.O + DMX X-forms

spriters_resource.note: 16x16 LCD rips; WebFetch 403s -> download via browser/curl UA

romanization_map_note: JP(humulos) -> EN(DVPet) needed for any diff. Canonical map lives in the audit script; key pairs: Bubbmon=Babumon, Vamdemon=Myotismon, Tailmon=Gatomon, Omegamon=Omnimon, Dukemon=Gallantmon, Hououmon=Phoenixmon, Mugendramon=Machinedramon, Pinochimon=Puppetmon, Peti Meramon=DemiMeramon, Anomalocarimon=Scorpiomon, Karatuki Numemon=ShellNumemon, V-dramon=Veedramon.

known_gaps.note: N.E.O dropped per user 2026-06-29 ('forget neo'). The DMX X-forms DVPet lacked are PRESENT in wayland-vpets dmall/+dmx/. Net: effectively no roster/sprite gap left. (Re-confirm DM20 Taichi's/Yamato's partner-variant sprites in wayland; minor.)
